phase_0_source_baseline.notes: TASK-00 and TASK-00B normalized docs/config/repository structure, reconciled local artifacts, and established a Git baseline.

phase_1_expert_b_performance_forensics.notes: TASK-02 measured dependency API drift, added compatibility shims, defaulted to array+fs timbre input, and completed a 40-file benchmark in 172.222937s.

phase_2_expert_b_integration_mvp.notes: TASK-04 produced one reviewed same-audio Expert A -> Expert B abnormal smoke JSON.

phase_3_expert_b_qualitative_protocol.notes: TASK-05 documented docs/expert_b_qualitative_protocol.md and applied it to the TASK-04 smoke output.

phase_4_structured_health_context.notes: TASK-06 implemented src/context schema/translator and saved one validated sample context JSON.

phase_5_llm_explanation_agent.notes: TASK-07 implemented deterministic guarded explanation output and optional mockable generator interface over Structured Health Context.

phase_6_maintenance_rag.notes: TASK-08 implemented manifest-gated local retrieval, source-preserving results, safe unavailable behavior, and citation validation; production KB is empty until approved_sources.json exists.

phase_7_end_to_end_orchestration.notes: TASK-10 implemented scripts/run_end_to_end_demo.py and saved one bounded Fan MVP JSON with component timings.

phase_8_dashboard.notes: Build a minimal dashboard over the TASK-10 end-to-end JSON artifact.

task_05_expert_b_qualitative_evidence_pr.notes: Documented docs/expert_b_qualitative_protocol.md with qualitative review procedure, MVP review record, acceptance criteria, and stop conditions.

task_06_structured_health_context_schema.notes: Implemented schema version 0.1.0, translator, tests, and sample context D:\PDM_Data\MIMII\processed\structured_context_fan_id_00_minus6dB_task06.json.

task_08_maintenance_knowledge_base_and_r.notes: Implemented src/rag knowledge base/retriever, tests/test_rag_grounding.py, manifest-gated approved-source policy, and D:\PDM_Data\MIMII\processed\rag_retrieval_smoke_task08.json.

task_11_dashboard_mvp.notes: Display one Fan MVP output with evidence and limitations.

current_expert_b_state.runtime_status: TASK-03 final bounded 40-reference index completed in 162.762365s using array+fs timbre input; mean total/file 4.067785s.
current_expert_b_state.qualitative_protocol_scope: Level 1 integration and qualitative characterization only; no direction accuracy, diagnosis, confidence, RUL, or exact reproduction claim.
current_expert_b_state.timbral_models_compatibility: legacy NumPy/librosa API drift patched in src/models/timbre_difference.py without changing metric formulas.

guardrails: rank scores remain qualitative local ranks

current_rag_state.production_unavailable_message: No approved maintenance source was retrieved; maintenance recommendations must remain unavailable.
guardrails: only manifest-listed approved:true .md/.txt files are indexed
loose files under data/manuals are ignored
retrieval preserves source ID, title, version, chunk ID, snippet, score, and path
empty production KB returns safe unavailable result
citation validation rejects non-retrieved source IDs
recommendation citations must be among retrieved source IDs
safe_unavailable mode is used when retrieval is unavailable
no RUL, time-to-failure, confidence percentage, root-cause certainty, or confirmed component failure wording
same audio path is preserved through Expert B and context
Expert B is gated on Expert A anomaly
technician output citations must be retrieved
no RUL, time-to-failure, confidence percentage, root-cause certainty, or confirmed component failure wording

observed_behavior: CPU delta was 9.53 CPU seconds over 10 wall-clock seconds
one-file path-based benchmark exceeded 23 minutes before interruption
must_not_do_next: do not rerun the 40-file job before one-file and three-file timing
do not run abnormal Expert B smoke before performance review
do not investigate or rerun benchmark during planning mode

TASK-00.notes: Repository normalized; active docs/report/audit created; Expert A artifacts preserved; no expensive data runs.

TASK-00B.notes: Repo-local large artifacts reconciled; verified duplicates removed; unique legacy model moved externally; baseline Git commit created.

TASK-01.notes: Original active-scope cleanup was completed inside TASK-00.

TASK-02.notes: Performance root cause measured and fixed; 40-file array-mode reference-index benchmark completed in 172.222937s; no scientific semantics changed.

TASK-03.notes: Built and validated D:\PDM_Data\MIMII\processed\timbre_reference_index_fan_id_00_minus6dB.json with 40 normal references, k=30 metadata, timing summary, and same-machine kNN validation.

TASK-07.notes: Implemented deterministic guarded explanation over Structured Health Context with optional mockable generator interface, 4 guardrail tests, and sample output D:\PDM_Data\MIMII\processed\guarded_explanation_fan_id_00_minus6dB_task07.json.

TASK-08.notes: Implemented manifest-gated local maintenance retriever, source-preserving retrieval output, citation validation, 4 RAG tests, and smoke artifact D:\PDM_Data\MIMII\processed\rag_retrieval_smoke_task08.json. Production KB is empty until approved_sources.json exists.

TASK-09.notes: Implemented grounded maintenance output with citation validation, safe_unavailable mode, 5 maintenance-agent tests, and smoke artifact D:\PDM_Data\MIMII\processed\grounded_maintenance_output_fan_id_00_minus6dB_task09.json.

TASK-10.notes: Implemented scripts/run_end_to_end_demo.py, 4 end-to-end tests, and one Fan MVP smoke JSON D:\PDM_Data\MIMII\processed\end_to_end_fan_id_00_minus6dB_task10.json with total runtime 15.792862s.

TASK-11.notes: Next executable task: build minimal dashboard over the TASK-10 end-to-end JSON artifact.
